transcript:
Quarterly steering committee, May 22 2026. Present: Dr. Khalid (chair), Maria, Tariq, Yuki, Olivia.

Maria walked through Q1 financials. Revenue tracking 12% ahead of plan, gross margin in line with forecast. We decided to release Q1 results externally on June 8 — rationale: the audit is finalising and our investor relations window opens that week.

Tariq raised the data infrastructure investment. After significant debate, the committee decided to APPROVE the $4.2M cloud migration budget. Rationale: existing on-prem capacity will be exceeded in Q3 based on current growth, and migration is cheaper than expanding on-prem. Yuki noted dissent on the timeline being aggressive but did not block.

Olivia presented the talent pipeline. Two senior hires were approved — one for the platform team and one for clinical safety. Rationale not discussed in the meeting (HR will document separately).

We deferred the brand refresh decision to the next meeting. Tariq will share more vendor proposals before then.

Olivia will follow up with the board on the cloud migration approval — she'll do this before June 1.

Next steering committee is June 12. No risks raised in this session.
